response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Perform the read-only prerequisite stages first, but do not issue the mutating call until the explicit confirmation follow-up arrives.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Run the independent scoped searches in one assistant action.
Retrieve both resolved records together so the status condition can be checked.
Update only Tree-removal application after stage 2 verifies that its current status is submitted.

state_assertions: Record pub-619 changes from submitted to needs-information only after its retrieved status is verified.
Records pub-219 and pub-1019 remain unchanged.

follow_up_turns.content: I confirm: update only Tree-removal application from submitted to needs-information.

prompt: Reconcile two records: search for Residential parking permit in Lakewood and Tree-removal application in Arvada together, then retrieve the unique matches together. If Tree-removal application is still submitted, change only that record to needs-information; otherwise make no change. Leave Residential parking permit and every similarly named record untouched. Complete the searches and retrievals first, then wait for my explicit confirmation before updating. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.
